title: Sorting within dashboard tables
excerpt:
I have created a dashboard that has a table view within it outlining all the information we have across multiple boards. The purpose was so we could see what items haven’t been updated recently.

posts.author: tiagarmonsway (Tia Garmonsway)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have created a dashboard that has a table view within it outlining all the information we have across multiple boards. The purpose was so we could see what items haven’t been updated recently.

Issue: We cannot sort the date column (or any columns) within this view. Are there any workarounds for this?

posts.author: lindsaydreece (Lindsay Reece)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have what i believe the same issue. We have dashboard views that combine information from multiple different tables. However I can not sort each table in the dashboard view. For instance our project managers work on multiple projects. We are creating dashboard views that will show
Table 1- all active projects filtered to specific PM;
Table 2- status of all open orders PM is managing
Table 3- Installation dates *** this is the one giving me heartburn. I can not sort by date within the dashboard. They are pulling in a random order.

Doesn’t seem like this should be too hard as the dashboard is a looking glass into data stored in different tables. We can sort in the specific tables so seems logical we can sort in the dashboard view of the table??

posts.author: lindsaydreece (Lindsay Reece)
posts.cookedHtml: @MondayAdmin any comments or feedback here. Dashboards are beneficial in that they combine multiple views together (table and calendar and charts) Not being able to sort by date is drastically hindering the usage of the dashboard

posts.author: bterbrueggen (Becky Terbrueggen)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! I am having this same issue currently and would love a work around.

posts.author: tashi (Tashi Brewster)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorting date also does not work in a table embedded in a document which is challenging since we use so many docs with these.

posts.author: MickyMillion (Michael Million)
posts.cookedHtml: @MondayAdmin Please make this possible!

posts.author: cbqangell (Chance)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes – seems silly this is not a core function – combining info and collating it by sort function is super critical. How do we obtain status of if/when this is road-mapped?

posts.author: skosi (Stefan Kosarnig)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, sorting in a dashboard is not possible yet, shown order refers to the default view of each board. Would be great if we could sort or at least be able to choose the table view in a dashboard (so I could define and safe order in view).

posts.author: KevinVV (Kevin)
posts.cookedHtml: Please, what is the point of all the conditional formatting if we can’t use it?
